title: Implementing the modernized Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 - Canada.ca
content:
## Implementing the modernized Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999
Public comment period : October 5, 2024 to December 4, 2024
Public comments received : A summary of the input received through this consultation is available in a What we heard report.
Public comment period : February 8, 2024 to April 8, 2024
Public comments received : A summary of the input received through this consultation is available in a What we heard report.
Public comment period : October 5, 2024 to December 4, 2024
Public comments received : A summary of the input received through this consultation is available in a What We Heard report.
Public comment period : September 14, 2024 to November 13, 2024
Public comments received : A summary of the input received through this consultation is available in a What we heard report.
Public comment period : November 30, 2023 to January 29, 2024
Public comments received : A summary of the input received through this consultation is available in a What we heard report.
Title : Implementing the modernized Canadian Environmental Protection Act: proposed Watch List Approach
Public comment period : October 5, 2024 to December 4, 2024
Public comments received : 30 comments were received on the proposed Approach document during the consultation period. All comments are taken into account in the developed Watch List Approach.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
